infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Voyager uses your location in the background to automatically detect when you leave home and begin a Voyage, log your current city, and close your Voyage when you return.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Voyager uses your location to detect when you're traveling and log your journey.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Voyager needs background location access to detect when you leave and return home, even when the app is closed.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Voyager detects when you leave home to automatically start a Voyage journal.
